title: Successful login redirects to dashboard
description: Verifies a Super Admin can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the dashboard.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email input field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password input field

title: Invalid password shows error message
description: Verifies an error is shown when the user enters a valid email format with an incorrect password.

steps.description: Type "admin@example.com" into the email input field
Type "wrong-password" into the password input field

title: Empty form submission shows required validation
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission and shows validation when both fields are empty.

title: Missing password shows validation or inline error
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission when password is missing.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email input field

title: Missing email shows validation or inline error
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission when email is missing.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password input field

title: Invalid email format prevents successful login
description: Verifies an invalid email format does not allow a successful login and keeps the user on the login page.

steps.description: Type "not-an-email" into the email input field
Type "some-password" into the password input field

title: Failed login keeps email value available for retry
description: Verifies after an invalid-credentials attempt, the user can correct only the password and try again.

steps.description: Type "admin@example.com" into the email input field
Type "wrong-password" into the password input field
Type "another-wrong-password" into the password input field

title: Access MockBook dashboard and verify KPI cards are visible
description: Verifies that an authenticated Super Admin can open the MockBook dashboard and see the platform KPI stat cards.

steps.description: Click the "MockBook" item in the main navigation

title: Open organization switcher and select an organization
description: Verifies that the organization switcher can be opened from the MockBook dashboard and an organization can be selected.

steps.description: Click the "MockBook" item in the main navigation
Click on the first organization option in the organization list

title: Switch to Test Series tab and navigate to Test Series list page
description: Verifies that the Test Series section is reachable from MockBook and opens the dedicated Test Series list route.

steps.description: Click the "MockBook" item in the main navigation
Click the "View All" or "Go to Test Series" link/button in the Test Series section

title: From Test Series list, start Create New Series flow
description: Verifies that a user can reach the Test Series creation wizard from the Test Series list.

steps.description: Click the "MockBook" item in the main navigation
Click the "View All" or "Go to Test Series" link/button in the Test Series section

title: Use Test Series search with a query that returns no results
description: Verifies that searching Test Series with a query that yields no matches shows an empty state message.

steps.description: Click the "MockBook" item in the main navigation
Type "zzzz-no-matches-123" into the Test Series search field

title: Navigate to Categories from MockBook header and verify Categories page loads
description: Verifies that the Categories page can be opened via the MockBook dashboard header button.

steps.description: Click the "MockBook" item in the main navigation
Click the "Categories" button in the MockBook header

title: Navigate to Featured from MockBook header and verify Featured page loads
description: Verifies that the Featured page can be opened via the MockBook dashboard header button.

steps.description: Click the "MockBook" item in the main navigation
Click the "Featured" button in the MockBook header

title: Switch across multiple MockBook tabs and verify each tab content is visible
description: Verifies that tab switching works for key MockBook sections and each tab shows recognizable content.

steps.description: Click the "MockBook" item in the main navigation

title: Search and filter test series then open Manage to reach series detail
description: Verifies search, category/status filters, and Manage navigation to a series detail page.

steps.description: Click "Test Series" tab or menu item
Select "SSC" from the Category filter dropdown
Select "Active" from the Status filter dropdown
Click the "Manage" button on the first visible series row

title: No results empty state when search and filters match nothing
description: Verifies the list shows a clear empty state when no series match applied search and filters.

steps.description: Click "Test Series" tab or menu item
Select "NEET" from the Category filter dropdown
Select "Archived" from the Status filter dropdown
Verify text "No series found" is visible

title: Clear filters after empty state to restore visible results
description: Verifies the user can clear applied search/filters and see results again after an empty state.

steps.description: Click "Test Series" tab or menu item
Verify text "No series found" is visible
Verify text "No series found" is not visible
Verify element "Test series table" is visible

title: Create New Series button opens the creation wizard entry screen
description: Verifies the Create New Series entry point is accessible from the list page.

steps.description: Click "Test Series" tab or menu item

title: Open per-series actions dropdown and see all expected actions
description: Verifies the per-row actions menu is present and includes Edit, Duplicate, Feature, Analytics, and Delete.

steps.description: Click "Test Series" tab or menu item
Open dropdown for actions on the first visible series row

title: Edit action opens an edit experience or edit page from the list
description: Verifies clicking Edit from the per-series actions leads to an edit screen or edit mode for that series.

steps.description: Click "Test Series" tab or menu item
Open dropdown for actions on the first visible series row

title: Analytics action navigates to a series analytics view
description: Verifies clicking Analytics from the per-series actions navigates to an analytics-related view for the selected series.

steps.description: Click "Test Series" tab or menu item
Open dropdown for actions on the first visible series row

title: Delete action shows a confirmation prompt before deleting
description: Verifies Delete is guarded by a visible confirmation step and does not immediately remove a series without confirmation.

steps.description: Click "Test Series" tab or menu item
Open dropdown for actions on the first visible series row
Verify text "Are you sure" is visible

title: Complete Steps 1–6 and publish a new Test Series (happy path, platform target, free pricing)
description: Verifies the wizard can be completed end-to-end with valid inputs and returns to the Test Series list with a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Test Series" in the MockBook navigation
Click on the "Create" or "New Test Series" button
Type "Automation Series - Platform Free" into the series name field
Select a category from the category dropdown
Click on a "+" button to increase a test count
Click on an "Add existing tests" control (button or link)
Click on the "Free" pricing type option

title: Step 1 required-field validation blocks progress
description: Verifies clicking Next with missing required fields shows validation messages and the user stays on Step 1.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Test Series" in the MockBook navigation
Click on the "Create" or "New Test Series" button

title: Step 1: Create an Org-targeted series and proceed to Step 2
description: Verifies the target selection can be changed to Org and the wizard advances when Step 1 is valid.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Test Series" in the MockBook navigation
Click on the "Create" or "New Test Series" button
Type "Automation Series - Org Target" into the series name field
Select a category from the category dropdown

title: Step 2: Decrease counts below zero is prevented (or blocked with validation)
description: Verifies the Step 2 test-count controls do not allow invalid negative values and the UI remains consistent.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Test Series" in the MockBook navigation
Click on the "Create" or "New Test Series" button
Type "Automation Series - Count Bounds" into the series name field
Select a category from the category dropdown
Click on a "-" button to decrease a test count

title: Step 3: Add existing tests and proceed to pricing
description: Verifies the Step 3 selection flow allows adding tests (or opening the selector) and the wizard can continue to Step 4.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Test Series" in the MockBook navigation
Click on the "Create" or "New Test Series" button
Type "Automation Series - Add Existing Tests" into the series name field
Select a category from the category dropdown
Click on a "+" button to increase a test count
Click on the "Add existing tests" button

title: Step 4: Paid pricing requires valid price before continuing
description: Verifies selecting Paid pricing and leaving price empty (or invalid) prevents moving to Step 5 and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Test Series" in the MockBook navigation
Click on the "Create" or "New Test Series" button
Type "Automation Series - Paid Price Validation" into the series name field
Select a category from the category dropdown
Click on a "+" button to increase a test count
Click on an "Add existing tests" control (button or link)
Click on the "Paid" pricing type option

title: Step 5: Unlock rule selection is required to proceed
description: Verifies the user cannot advance to Step 6 without selecting an unlock rule (or a default is clearly applied).

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Test Series" in the MockBook navigation
Click on the "Create" or "New Test Series" button
Type "Automation Series - Unlock Rule Required" into the series name field
Select a category from the category dropdown
Click on a "+" button to increase a test count
Click on an "Add existing tests" control (button or link)
Click on the "Free" pricing type option

title: Step 6: Review summary is visible before publishing
description: Verifies the final review step shows a visible summary/checklist and the Publish button is present.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Test Series" in the MockBook navigation
Click on the "Create" or "New Test Series" button
Type "Automation Series - Review Visible" into the series name field
Select a category from the category dropdown
Click on a "+" button to increase a test count
Click on an "Add existing tests" control (button or link)
Click on the "Free" pricing type option

title: View Exam Categories grid loads and shows category cards
description: Verifies that an authenticated admin can reach the Categories page and see the categories grid populated with cards.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Categories" in the MockBook navigation
Verify element "exam category cards grid" is visible

title: Expand a category card to view its Featured Series section
description: Verifies that clicking a category card expands it and reveals the Featured Series section/content.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Categories" in the MockBook navigation
Click on the first category card in the grid

title: Expand Featured Series list within an expanded category
description: Verifies that the Featured Series list/area becomes visible when expanding a category and opening its featured series section.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Categories" in the MockBook navigation
Click on a category card that is visible in the grid
Click on the "Featured" or "Featured Series" section header within the expanded card
Verify element "featured series list" is visible

title: Add Category form opens and can be cancelled without changes
description: Verifies that the Add Category dialog/form opens and can be dismissed without adding a new category.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Categories" in the MockBook navigation
Verify text "Add Category" is not visible

title: Add Category shows validation when name is empty
description: Verifies that saving a new category without a name shows a visible validation message and does not add a card.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Categories" in the MockBook navigation

title: Attempt to add a new category and observe non-persistence behavior
description: Verifies the UI behavior when adding a category, acknowledging that backend persistence may be unavailable (may show toast and may not persist after refresh).

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Categories" in the MockBook navigation
Type "Automation Category" into the category name field

title: Edit icon opens Edit Category UI for an existing category
description: Verifies that clicking the Edit icon on a category card opens an edit dialog/form with expected context.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Categories" in the MockBook navigation
Click the "Edit" icon on a visible category card

title: Delete category cancellation keeps the category card visible
description: Verifies that canceling the delete confirmation dialog does not remove the category from the grid.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Categories" in the MockBook navigation
Click the "Delete" icon on the first visible category card
Verify element "exam category cards grid" is visible

title: Delete category confirm shows error/failure toast when persistence is unavailable
description: Verifies that confirming deletion results in a visible error/failure toast when backend persistence is not available (as expected in this environment).

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on "Categories" in the MockBook navigation
Click the "Delete" icon on a visible category card

title: Load Featured page and view category-wise featured sections
description: Verifies that an authenticated admin can open the Featured page and see category-wise featured sections and an ordered list of series.

title: Toggle a series featured status and see immediate UI change
description: Verifies that toggling a series featured status updates the visible toggle state in the list.

steps.description: Click the featured toggle for the first visible series in the list

title: Move a series up in the order within its category section
description: Verifies that clicking the up arrow moves a series higher in the visible ordering.

steps.description: Click the up arrow for the second visible series in the first category section

title: Move a series down in the order within its category section
description: Verifies that clicking the down arrow moves a series lower in the visible ordering.

steps.description: Click the down arrow for the first visible series in the first category section

title: Save Order shows a success toast after reordering
description: Verifies that after changing order, clicking Save Order shows a success confirmation toast.

steps.description: Click the up arrow for the second visible series in the first category section

title: Save Order after toggling featured status shows a confirmation toast
description: Verifies that toggling featured status and saving presents a visible confirmation message.

steps.description: Click the featured toggle for the first visible series in the list

title: Category-wise featured sections are visible when scrolling the page
description: Verifies that multiple category-wise featured sections can be viewed and interacted with across the page.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the Featured page

title: Reorder and save, then verify ordering is not persisted after page reload (UI-only limitation)
description: Verifies the known UI-only behavior that saving order does not persist after a page reload.

steps.description: Click the up arrow for the second visible series in the first category section

title: Analytics dashboard loads and shows core KPIs and key visual sections
description: Verifies the analytics page renders with KPI cards and major chart/table sections visible for a logged-in admin.

title: Change date range to 30 days updates the visible selection and keeps KPIs visible
description: Verifies selecting the 30-day range works from the dropdown and the KPI cards remain visible afterward.

title: KPI cards are visible and labeled correctly
description: Verifies the four KPI cards appear on the analytics dashboard with the expected labels.

title: Daily tests bar chart section is present and visible
description: Verifies the daily tests bar chart area renders on the analytics dashboard.

steps.description: Verify element "daily tests bar chart" is visible

title: Top series and top tests tables are visible
description: Verifies both ranking tables render and show their section titles on the analytics dashboard.

steps.description: Verify element "top series by enrollment table" is visible
Verify element "top tests by attempts table" is visible

title: Revenue breakdown visualization is visible
description: Verifies the revenue breakdown bars section is present on the analytics dashboard.

steps.description: Verify element "revenue breakdown bars" is visible

title: Create a new MockTest inside a Series and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies an admin can drill into an org’s mock tests hierarchy, create a mock test with valid inputs, and see it listed.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation

title: Validation: invalid duration blocks MockTest creation
description: Verifies the create dialog shows a validation error and does not create a test when duration is invalid.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation

title: Create a new Category from the MockTests page
description: Verifies an admin can create a new exam category and see it appear as a category card.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation

title: Create a new Series inside a selected Category
description: Verifies an admin can drill into a category and create a new test series within it.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on an Exam Category card

title: Create a new Folder inside a selected Series
description: Verifies an admin can drill into a series and create a new folder in that series.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on an Exam Category card
Click on a Test Series card to drill down

title: Create MockTest button is disabled outside a Series context
description: Verifies the Create MockTest button is not enabled until the user drills into a Series.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation

title: Search tests by name within a folder
description: Verifies that searching by test name filters the visible test list in the current folder.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on an Exam Category card

title: Filter tests by status and type within a folder
description: Verifies that selecting status/type filters changes the visible tests list.

steps.description: Click on "MockBook" in the main navigation
Click on an Exam Category card
Click on a Test Series card to drill down

title: Organizations list loads and shows organizations table
description: Verifies the Organizations page is accessible after login and displays the organizations listing UI.

title: Search organizations by name returns matching results
description: Verifies searching by organization name filters the visible organization rows.

title: Search organizations by ID returns matching results
description: Verifies searching by organization ID filters the visible organization rows.

title: Filter organizations by plan updates the list
description: Verifies selecting a plan filter changes the visible organizations list.

steps.description: Select "Pro" from the plan filter dropdown

title: Filter organizations by status updates the list
description: Verifies selecting a status filter changes the visible organizations list.

steps.description: Select "Active" from the status filter dropdown

title: Open organization details from list row
description: Verifies clicking an organization row navigates to the organization details page and shows details content.

steps.description: Click on the first organization row in the organizations table

title: Change organization plan from details page and confirm success
description: Verifies an admin can change the organization plan from the details page and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on the first organization row in the organizations table
Click the organization plan selector control

title: Cancel plan change confirmation does not apply changes
description: Verifies canceling the confirmation dialog does not change the organization plan.

steps.description: Click on the first organization row in the organizations table
Click the organization plan selector control
Click the "Cancel" button in the confirmation dialog

title: Toggle organization status from list and confirm action
description: Verifies toggling an organization status from the list requires confirmation and completes the flow.

steps.description: Click the status toggle for the first organization row
